metadata.delay: how many milliseconds before next event

events.text:
SYSTEM ALERT:
Destination Locked | Magnetar T-9

ADAM:
This is the final resource that we need.
We should be able to do it quick and swift, easy!

SYSTEM ALERT:
Huge ship signature detected.

ENEMY COMMANDER:
STAY BACK! You stand no chance against our warship!

ENEMY COMMANDER:
This is your last warning, change course and you may live.

ADAM:
Ignore their posturing, Pilot. Target the hull. Tear it apart.

ENEMY COMMANDER:
Arrogant machine! Let see your 'star pilot' dodge at
lightspeed!
